content: Laravel file upload validation: use Request::validate() with 'required|file|max:10240|mimes:zip' (or Rules\File::types(['application/zip'])->max(10240)). For secure extraction, extract ZIP to storage_path('app/tmp/') first (outside web root), validate extracted contents against an allowlist of extensions, then move only validated files to the target directory. The current ModuleZipInspector already does temp extraction but needs to block dangerous extensions instead of just detecting them. Add explicit blocklist enforcement: reject ZIPs containing .php, .phtml, .sh, .exe files entirely. Use finfo_file() for MIME verification after extraction.
